zh.lifeSummary: 當Marguerite de LOUBET於大約1120年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代沙吉麥森吉素-維時，她的父親Alon Loubet31歲，母親Alise de Chantemerle26歲。她於大約1152年與Thibault II de CHABOT在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代普札勒斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1180年在法國努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marguerite de LOUBET于大约1120年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代沙吉麥森吉素-維时，她的父亲Alon Loubet31岁，母亲Alise de Chantemerle26岁。她于大约1152年与Thibault II de CHABOT在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易波代普札勒斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1180年在法国努維勒-阿吉泰豪-維安利莫格斯享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: LOUBET
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jean Baptiste, Monique.
French: probably a habitational name for someone from Doubs, a place in Franche-Comté.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Marguerite de LOUBET was born about 1120, in Saint-Maixent-sur-Vie, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France, her father, Alon Loubet, was 31 and her mother, Alise de Chantemerle, was 26. She married Thibault II de CHABOT about 1152, in Pouzauges, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died about 1180, in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marguerite de LOUBET est née environ 1120, à Saint-Maixent-sur-Vie, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Alon Loubet, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alise de Chantemerle, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Thibault II de CHABOT environ 1152, à Pouzauges, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1180, à Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marguerite de LOUBET um 1120 in Saint-Maixent-sur-Vie, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alon Loubet 31 und ihre Mutter Alise de Chantemerle 26. Sie hat um 1152 in Pouzauges, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Thibault II de CHABOT geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1180 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de LOUBET è nata il circa 1120 nel Saint-Maixent-sur-Vie, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia, sua padre, Alon Loubet, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alise de Chantemerle, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Thibault II de CHABOT circa 1152, nel Pouzauges, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1180, nel Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marguerite de LOUBETが約1120年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーベンドeサイント-メイクセント-スル-ヴィで生まれた時，父Alon Loubetは31歳，母Alise de Chantemerleは26歳であった。約1152年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーベンドeポウザウジェズでThibault II de CHABOTと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1180年にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインハウテ-ヴィエンリモジェズで62歳で死去した。

ko.Pouzauges,85182,Vendée,Pays de la Loire,: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 파우자그스
ko.Saint-Maixent-sur-VIe,85239,Vendée,Pays: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 세인트-메이세트-수-비
ko.Vouvant,85305,Vendée,Pays de la Loire,FR: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 보우반트
ko.lifeSummary: Marguerite de LOUBET(이)가 대략 1120년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 세인트-메이세트-수-비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alon Loubet(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alise de Chantemerle(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1152년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 파우자그스에서 Thibault II de CHABOT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1180년 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 하테-비니 리모그스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marguerite de LOUBET nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Saint-Maixent-sur-Vie, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Alon Loubet, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alise de Chantemerle, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Thibault II de CHABOT aproximadamente 1152, em Pouzauges, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1180, em Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marguerite de LOUBET родилась около 1120 г. в местности сеинт-меиксент-сур-ви, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, её отцу по имени Alon Loubet было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alise de Chantemerle, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thibault II de CHABOT около 1152 г. в местности поузаугесь, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1180 г. в местности лимогесь, хауте-виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marguerite de LOUBET nació aproximadamente 1120, en Saint-Maixent-sur-Vie, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Alon Loubet, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alise de Chantemerle, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Thibault II de CHABOT aproximadamente 1152, en Pouzauges, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1180, en Limoges, Haute-Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 62 años.
